data.title: Europe Stereotactic Neuro-Navigation System Market to reach $1.01 billion by 2035 from $269.0 million in 2024, growing at 13.14% CAGR.
data.description: A new report titled "Europe Stereotactic Neuro-Navigation System Market: Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It projects that the Europe stereotactic neuro-navigation system market will see substantial growth, reaching $1.01 billion by 2035 compared to $269.0 million in 2024. This represents a notable CAGR of 13.14% anticipated during the forecast period of 2025-2035. The increased demand for stereotactic neuro-navigation systems in Europe is expected to be a key factor driving this market expansion.

data.title: Trio-Tech (NYSE: TRT) reports Q4 revenue growth and profitability. CEO highlights strong momentum in the industry.
data.description: In Van Nuys, California, Trio-Tech International (NYSE: TRT), a company offering semiconductor back-end solutions and electronic equipment globally, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and full year concluding on June 30, 2025. S.W. Yong, Chairman and CEO of Trio-Tech International, remarked on the performance. In the fourth quarter, the company experienced a rise in revenue compared to the previous year and sustained profitability, mainly attributed to robust progress in its Industria division.
U.S. SEC CHAIR ATKINS ON QUARTERLY REPORTING: MARKET CAN DECIDE WHAT PROPER CADENCE IS

data.title: Celebrate Israeli wines this season with IWPA - one of the fastest-growing wine regions.
data.description: Explore the burgeoning wine scene in Israel, one of the world's fastest-growing wine regions, presented by the Israeli Wine Producers Association (IWPA). Experience the diverse range of wines this holiday season, ranging from festive fall gatherings to winter holiday celebrations. As of September 19, 2025, the IWPA invites wine enthusiasts to discover unique Israeli wines in Bayonne, N.J. Embrace this trend with the IWPA as Israel stands out with its exceptional growth in the wine industry, boasting an impressive increase in production and quality. Cheers to a memorable holiday season with a taste of the flourishing Israeli wine culture.

data.title: Investigation by Hagens Berman into Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) for alleged inventory overload causing 21% stock drop.
data.description: In San Francisco on September 19, 2025, Hagens Berman, a well-known law firm focusing on shareholder rights, announced an investigation into Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY), a leading beauty company globally. This inquiry comes in response to a substantial 21% decline in Coty's stock value on August 21, 2025.

data.title: Researchers at Chung-Ang University introduce MoBluRF, a framework creating sharp 4D reconstructions from blurry videos.
data.description: A revolutionary framework has been created by researchers in Seoul, South Korea, as of September 19, 2025. This framework has the capability to generate precise neural radiance fields from unclear monocular videos. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) is a cutting-edge method for producing three-dimensional (3D) visual scene depictions. This newly developed framework holds significant promise for advancing the field of video processing and computer vision.

data.title: Miami FC's defender, Walid "Tulu" Yacoubou to make high-stakes return with new cleats from Local Spark Solutions and Ringba.
data.description: In Miami on September 19, 2025, Local Spark Solutions and Ringba disclosed that Walid "Tulu" Yacoubou, a prominent defender for Miami FC, will be making a significant comeback to the starting lineup. Alongside his return, he will unveil an innovative and unique pair of gear. This revelation marks an important development for the team and the fans, emphasizing Yacoubou's anticipated impact on the upcoming games.

data.title: LabWare releases Clinical Health Solution 5.06, improving efficiency for labs. Leader in LIMS for 30 years. Sept 19, 2025.
data.description: LabWare, Inc., a renowned global provider of Laboratory Information Management Systems (LIMS) for over three decades, has unveiled the Clinical Health Solution on September 19, 2025, in Wilmington, Delaware. This new release aims to enhance performance and efficiency for clinical and public health labs. With LabWare's expertise in LIMS technology, the solution is poised to revolutionize operations in these sectors. LabWare's pioneering work over the years has solidified its status as a leader in the industry, serving a wide range of clients worldwide. This latest innovation reflects the company's commitment to driving progress and innovation in laboratory management.

data.title: n-Tier wins "Best Data Governance Solution" award at Data Management Insight Awards USA 2025, aiding financial institutions with compliance.
data.description: An important acknowledgment highlights the pivotal role of n-Tier in assisting financial institutions to stay ahead of changing compliance requirements. The award was received in New York on September 19, 2025. n-Tier is a leading technology firm that focuses on aiding companies in ensuring the precision and integrity of their essential business operations.

data.title: Evommune reveals Phase 2 data on EVO756 for Chronic Inducible Urticaria at EADV 2025: 93% patient response, good safety.
data.description: Positive clinical outcomes were observed in 93% of patients within four weeks based on FricTest Score or Pruritus-NRS. Improvement was noted as early as the first week. The safety and tolerability profile was favorable, in line with results from a previous Phase 1 study in healthy volunteers called CIndU.

data.title: Kyochon Chicken reopens first overseas store in LA "Mid-Wilshire" after 18 years. introduces craft beer "Moonbear".
data.description: In Los Angeles on September 19, 2025, the original overseas Kyochon store, established in 2007, has been transformed into a forward-thinking establishment that combines traditional values with modern innovation. This revamped store introduces a novel concept which includes the introduction of a high-quality craft beer named "Moonbear."
Johnson & Johnson Reports Complete Response in All Patients After Induction Therapy and No Serious Adverse Events Despite Study Treatment Discontinuation

data.title: Maxar partners with AIDC to enhance Taiwan's UAV industry against GPS interference using Raptor software.
data.description: Maxar Intelligence has partnered with Taiwan's Aerospace Industrial Development Corporation (AIDC) to implement the Maxar Raptor software suite within Taiwan's UAV sector. This collaboration aims to enhance the resilience and dependability of autonomous systems in GPS- and GNSS-challenged settings. Raptor, a vision-centered software suite, will be deployed to support Taiwan's UAV industry, laying the groundwork for technological advancements in this field.

data.title: EU boosts pressure on Russia with new sanctions targeting energy profits and global business; aimed at chipping away at their economy.
data.description: The most recent series of restrictions imposed by the European Union target Russia’s energy profits and its capacity to engage in global business.

data.title: Advantus Corp. to acquire several iconic brands like Perler, Dimensions, Boye, Anker Play, adding to its craft and educational supply portfolios.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on September 19, 2025, Advantus Corp., a private company specializing in office, craft, home, recreation, and luggage and tactical products, revealed their acquisition of a number of renowned brands. These include Perler, Dimensions, Boye, Anker Play, among others.

data.title: BRBR shares plummet $17.46 (-32%) due to low Q3 2025 earnings, decreased gross margins, and depressed net earnings.
data.description: In San Francisco, on September 19, 2025, it was reported that on August 5, 2025, shareholders of BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE: BRBR) experienced a sharp decline in share value by $17.46 (-32%) following the release of the company's Q3 2025 financial performance. The report highlighted a notable decrease in net earnings, with a warning issued regarding future earnings potential.

data.title: Portrait Capital acquires AAi Labels & Decals and Sticker Ranch to form specialty label platform, accelerating growth.
data.description: In a significant development, Portrait Capital, a private investment firm, has recently acquired AAi Labels & Decals as part of their strategy to enhance customer offerings and drive growth. The partnership, based in JONESBORO, Ark., commenced on Sept. 19, 2025, and combines extensive experience with digital advancements to deliver improved solutions. This acquisition marks a pivotal moment for both companies as they aim to leverage their expertise for accelerated expansion.

data.title: Yolanda M. Smith, Founder of Branding 4 Success®, named finalist in the 2025 Stevie Awards for Women in Business.
data.description: A global event in New York will celebrate the achievements of women worldwide. Yolanda M. Smith, the Founder of Branding 4 Success®, has been recognized as a Finalist in the Mentor or Coach of the Year – Business category at the prestigious 22nd annual Stevie® Awards for Women. The event is scheduled to take place in Indianapolis on September 19, 2025.
